title: Flavor Pidginhole
description: Developed a full-stack social media platform where users can create, share, and interact with recipes.

title: Travel Journal
description: A personal travel diary built with React and deployed on GitHub Pages. This single-page application showcases my travel experiences.

title: Bored Bot
description: A fun and interactive web application that helps cure your boredom by suggesting random activities to do!

title: Kanban Board
description: a Kanban board designed for Agile teams. It features a secure login system where users can log in, manage their work tasks, and have their session authenticated using JSON Web Tokens (JWT).

title: Learning Journal
description: A responsive personal blog website documenting a web development learning journey. Built with HTML, CSS, and modern responsive design principles.

title: BlogSpace
description: BlogSpace is a clean, minimalist blogging platform that lets users quickly share thoughts and stories. Perfect for writers, bloggers, or anyone who wants a simple way to publish content without the complexity of traditional blogging platforms.

title: War Card Game
description: A web-based implementation of the classic card game War built with vanilla JavaScript, HTML, and CSS. Challenge the computer in this simple yet engaging card game where the highest card wins!

title: Twimba— X Clone
description: A Twitter-like social media application built with vanilla JavaScript, HTML, and CSS.

title: Tenzies
description: A simple yet addictive game where you roll dice until all of them show the same value. You can click on individual dice to 'hold' them between rolls, gradually working towards getting all ten dice to display the same number.

title: NFT Site
description: A satirical landing page for a fictional NFT marketplace that humorously presents overpriced digital assets. This responsive website showcases modern web development practices while poking fun at the NFT craze.

title: Purrfect Meme Picker
description: A delightful web application that helps you find the perfect cat meme based on your current emotion! Whether you're feeling moody, happy, confused, or anything in between, Pumpkin has got the right cat image for you.

title: Science Stream
description: A modern, responsive science news aggregation website featuring articles across multiple scientific disciplines including technology, environment, NASA discoveries, physics, and health.

title: Worst Cookie Consent
description: A satirical web project that parodies deceptive online marketing tactics and sketchy data collection practices commonly found on dubious coding course websites.

title: Leads Tracker Mobile App
description: A simple, lightweight web application for saving and managing website URLs. Perfect for sales representatives, recruiters, or anyone who needs to keep track of important web links.

title: Chrome Ext Leads Tracker
description: A simple Chrome extension that allows you to save important URLs/leads for later reference. Perfect for sales professionals, researchers, or anyone who needs to keep track of websites they visit.

title: Social Network API
description: Developed a RESTful API for social networking features including user authentication, friend connections, and post management.

title: Tech Quiz Game
description: An interactive tech quiz application with end-to-end (E2E) and component testing using Cypress.

title: Takeout Menu & Order System
description: A program that allows customers to place orders with a takeout restaurant, and receive an itemized receipt.

title: SQL Employee Tracker
description: A Super Mario themed command-line application to effieciently manage a company's employee database.
